subcodes.first_line: O Ibn Ashraf! Upon thee be the glory of God, His grace, His bounty and His radiance. Verily, the oppressors have descended upon Us [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن اشرف علیک بهاء الله و فضله و عطائه و ضیائه قد ورد علینا من الظالمین
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for martyrs, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @goodly deeds; actions
